calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch and Daniel Conred for and with Gene Marchi.

Ms. Rasch addressed the issue of paying fees without prior Court approval, takes full responsibility for the mistake, and also explained additional services provided. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of written order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Peetition For Authority To Execute Deed Transferring Real Property To Lender.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Gene Marchi (Executor).

Ms. Rasch stated that she has no idea who the Share Holders are of Ocwen, that the lender will not talk to them/release information because they are not the borrower, that Mr. Moyhee went through bankruptcy and that the Beneficiaries did not want them to pursue the judgment. The Petition for Authority to Execute Deed Transferring Real Property to Lender was granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Advanced From Jun-06-12 To May-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Gene Marchi (Executor).

Ms. Rasch explained that the Beneficiaries do not want to pursue the proceeding against Mr. Mohyee. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions (subject to review/modification of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Continued To Sep-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
